summary: The instruction suggests storage below room temperature but above freezing; this ensures stability without compromising efficacy or safety within recommended limits set by pharmaceutical guidelines. Thus, it indicates an ideal range around 8-15 °C as specified under Option D. To ensure proper preservation, adhering strictly to these cooler conditions prevents degradation issues critical for therapeutic outcomes. Agent2 reasoned that based on standard medical practices outlined here, maintaining such controlled cooling helps protect drugs from adverse effects due to heat exposure which could otherwise diminish their potency significantly beyond acceptable thresholds defined medically.
